commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And it shall come to pass in that day, I will answer, says the LORD, I will answer the heavens, and they shall answer the earth; Hear the heavens All shall conspire in favour of the Church, which in the following verse is called Jezrahel, that is, the seed of God. (Challoner) Harmony shall subsist between all the parts of the universe. The earth shall receive rain This happiness was enjoyed in figure by the Jews, after their return, and in reality by Christians. (Theodoret).

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: Hear the heavens: All shall conspire in favour of the church, which in the following verse is called Jezrahel, that is, the seed of God.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
